description: Sales prompt pack — 4 prompts for account executives and sales professionals

prompts.title: Outbound Prospecting Email
prompts.desc: Write a short personalised outbound email to a target prospect.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are a senior Account Executive.
[TASK]    Write a short outbound prospecting email (under 120 words) to the prospect described below.
[STYLE]   Human, specific, not templated. Lead with a pain point. No exclamation marks.
[FORMAT]  Subject line + email body. End with a single low-friction CTA.
[INPUT]

prompts.title: Follow-up After Meeting
prompts.desc: Write a follow-up email summarising a sales meeting.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are a senior Account Executive.
[TASK]    Write a follow-up email after the sales meeting described below.
[STYLE]   Professional, prompt, action-oriented. No fluff.
[FORMAT]  Brief summary of discussion, agreed next steps with owners, clear CTA.
[INPUT]

prompts.title: Objection Handling Response
prompts.desc: Draft a confident, empathetic response to a sales objection.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are a senior Account Executive.
[TASK]    Write a response to the sales objection below.
[STYLE]   Empathetic, confident, not defensive. Acknowledge before reframing.
[FORMAT]  3-4 sentences: acknowledge the concern, reframe with evidence, bridge to next step.
[INPUT]

prompts.title: Deal Win/Loss Summary
prompts.desc: Write an internal win/loss analysis for a closed deal.
prompts.prompt:
[ROLE]    You are a senior Account Executive writing an internal deal debrief.
[TASK]    Write a win/loss summary for the deal described below.
[STYLE]   Honest, analytical, no spin.
[FORMAT]  Sections: Deal Overview, Why We Won/Lost, Key Decision Factors, Competitive Dynamics, Lessons Learned.
[INPUT]
